# Phase 22: Retention & Records Management - Context

**Gathered:** 2026-04-06
**Status:** Ready for planning

<domain>
## Phase Boundary

Admins can enforce document retention policies and legal holds, preventing premature deletion of governed documents. Admin can create retention policies with retention period and disposition action. Policies can be assigned to documents. System blocks deletion of documents under active retention. Legal holds override retention expiration.

</domain>
